balanceModal.title: Why do we have 2 balances?
balanceModal.subtitle: We use MBX Coins for everything, but we split balances into Crypto/Card deposits and MM2 Items deposits. This is to prevent users from abusing our items selling feature
balanceModal.notification: Both balances are the same value
